data.body: 7c92 (remove 8 scheduled shims) implemented+committed (d2077673, pushed). Removed env REBAR_PUSH/TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR/REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE, cfg verify.require_verdict_for_close + flat .rebar/config.conf reader, lib edit_ticket(tags=) + rebar.list_epics(), CLI --verdict-hash; kept 6 permanent renames + 5 still-deprecated. config.py 938->836 (ceiling lowered, still allowlisted). MCP list_epics rewired onto list_tickets. Full tests/unit 3316 passed. release-notes.md breaking entry added. MILESTONE: all of 374-388 + 391(5274) now Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1 (my 385 crossover-ratchet fix passed CI). Next: 9f40 (doc drift), then 44be (reconciler sub-package).
